vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="60" x="470" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="损失面（等高线）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="140" x="560" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="minlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="最小值" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="70" x="466" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d0" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d79b00;strokeColor=#a6822a;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="338" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d79b00;strokeColor=#a6822a;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="402" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d79b00;strokeColor=#a6822a;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="446" y="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d79b00;strokeColor=#a6822a;" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#b85450;strokeColor=#7a3330;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="14" width="14" x="494" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s0" edge="1" parent="1" source="d0" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="d1" value="−η∇L"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" edge="1" parent="1" source="d1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="d2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" edge="1" parent="1" source="d2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="d3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" edge="1" parent="1" source="d3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;" target="dmin" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="upd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="参数更新
θ ← θ − η ∇L" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="40" y="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="terms" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#444444;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="η 学习率 = 步长（大易震荡/发散，小则慢）
动量：累积历史梯度方向，加速收敛、越过小坑
mini-batch：每步用一小批样本估计梯度
梯度裁剪：限制梯度范数上限，防止参数爆掉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="270" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="梯度下降：朝损失下降最快的方向（负梯度）一步步更新参数 θ。每一步走多远由学习率 η 控制。优化器在此基础上加技巧：动量平滑方向、mini-batch 降噪提速、梯度裁剪防止偶发大梯度。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="720" x="20" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 370px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 图：梯度下降 —— 沿负梯度一步步走向损失最小处

div.div:
参数更新
θ ← θ − η ∇L

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 165px; margin-left: 32px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #444444;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#444444, #b3b3b3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
η 学习率 = 步长（大易震荡/发散，小则慢）
动量：累积历史梯度方向，加速收敛、越过小坑
mini-batch：每步用一小批样本估计梯度
梯度裁剪：限制梯度范数上限，防止参数爆掉

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 322px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #222222;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#222222, #d0d0d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 梯度下降：朝损失下降最快的方向（负梯度）一步步更新参数 θ。每一步走多远由学习率 η 控制。优化器在此基础上加技巧：动量平滑方向、mini-batch 降噪提速、梯度裁剪防止偶发大梯度。
